hero.headline: Create Your Unique Piece
hero.subheadline: VACE redefines custom streetwear. Premium flannels elevated by hand-applied pearls, custom distressing, and exclusive details – crafted to your exact vision.

premium.title: Premium Selection
premium.description: The foundation is always an extremely high-quality, heavyweight flannel. Carefully selected by us for the perfect, modern streetwear fit.

embellished.title: Hand-Embellished
embellished.description: True craftsmanship in every detail. Each pearl, cut, and custom application is individually and precisely placed in our atelier in Germany.

oneOf.title: 1 of 1 Design
oneOf.description: No mass production, no restocks. Your piece is refined individually to your vision. An absolute one-of-a-kind that exists only for you.

step1.title: Share Your Vision
step1.description: Tell us what vibe you're looking for. Color, fit, and the level of distressing – you set the direction, we execute it.

step2.title: Premium Blank Selection
step2.description: We source the perfect, heavyweight base flannel for your project. Quality and fit are paramount here.

step3.title: Hand-Customized
step3.description: In our atelier in Germany, your piece is refined. Each pearl, cut, and custom stitch is placed by hand.

step4.title: Your 1 of 1
step4.description: Your exclusive VACE flannel is carefully packaged and shipped to you. No one else in the world has exactly this piece.

orderForm.headline: Design Your VACE
orderForm.description: Fill out the form – we'll get back to you within 24 hours with your custom quote.

tally.title: Contact Data (Tally)
tally.description: Name, email, and Instagram handle are processed exclusively for custom requests, invoicing, and shipping.
tally.legal: Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR (Performance of contractual obligations)
tally.storage: Storage period: 10 years after contract termination
